name: about-time-monorepo
description: Multi-user nutrition tracking app with offline-first support

scripts.build:frontend: npm run build --workspace=@tannerbroberts/about-time-core && npm run build --workspace=@about-time/types && npm run build --workspace=@about-time/api-client && npm run build --workspace=@about-time/frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build --workspace=@tannerbroberts/about-time-core && npm run build --workspace=@about-time/types && npm run build --workspace=@about-time/api-client && npm run build --workspace=@about-time/backend
